role_summary: the sox auditor ensures compliance with the sarbanes -oxley act by evaluating internal  controls over financial reporting.
responsibilities: • test internal controls under sox framework   • document control design and operating effec tiveness   • identify control deficiencies and remediation plans   • coordinate with process owners and management   • support internal and external sox audits   • maintain sox documentation and compliance reports
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong understanding  of sox and icfr   • process documentation and testing expertise
